source_pr.title: ddl: fix a test case leak cause CI timeout
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #30822

The CI is unstable and it blocks my PR merge.

Problem Summary:

```
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] panic: test timed out after 10m0s
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] 
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] goroutine 598 [running]:
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] testing.(*M).startAlarm.func1()
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] 	/usr/local/go/src/testing/testing.go:1700 +0xe5
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] created by time.goFunc
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] 	/usr/local/go/src/time/sleep.go:180 +0x45
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] 
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] goroutine 1 [chan receive, 10 minutes]:
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] testing.(*T).Run(0xc00119d680, 0x4103d85, 0xa, 0x420e498, 0x13be301)
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] 	/usr/local/go/src/testing/testing.go:1239 +0x2da
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] testing.runTests.func1(0xc0009c9080)
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] 	/usr/local/go/src/testing/testing.go:1511 +0x78
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] testing.tRunner(0xc0009c9080, 0xc00103fc80)
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] 	/usr/local/go/src/testing/testing.go:1193 +0xef
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] testing.runTests(0xc0002c5b78, 0x5f44e80, 0xe, 0xe, 0xc074046d5efdbe55, 0x8bb6937dbd, 0x6632b00, 0x3d9c420)
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] 	/usr/local/go/src/testing/testing.go:1509 +0x2fe
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] testing.(*M).Run(0xc0005f0100, 0x0)
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] 	/usr/local/go/src/testing/testing.go:1417 +0x1eb
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] go.uber.org/goleak.VerifyTestMain(0x464b080, 0xc0005f0100, 0xc0052e9e70, 0x2, 0x2)
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] 	/go/pkg/mod/go.uber.org/goleak@v1.1.12/testmain.go:53 +0x38
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain_test.TestMain(0xc0005f0100)
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] 	 /home/jenkins/agent/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain/main_test.go:30 +0xd7
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] main.main()
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] 	_testmain.go:137 +0x1f6 
[2022-01-25T06:35:50.712Z] 
```

### What is changed and how it works?

The timeout is caused by some session goroutine leak in the test case.
Fix a potential place that cause the leak.

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note

```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: ddl: fix a test case leak cause CI timeout.
fix_pattern: ddl: fix a test case leak cause CI timeout
analysis:

PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/31950
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal

Changed files (1): ddl/db_integration_test.go
Patch url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/31950.patch
Picked test: type=unit path=ddl/db_integration_test.go name=db_integration_test
